'''Dodecapolis''' was the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] of the [[Givin/Legends|Givin]] homeworld of [[Yag'Dhul/Legends|Yag'Dhul]]<ref name="CE">{{CSWECite|I|194|Dodecapolis}}</ref> at least during the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]]<ref name="NEW54" /> and the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].<ref name="IC73">{{InsiderCite|73|CIS Shadowfeed Dispatch 15:01:15 Edition}}</ref> Givin society had developed extremely advanced technology that supported the construction of [[City/Legends|cities]]-shelters made up of hermetically sealed buildings capable of withstanding even the most severe ravages of the planet’s incredible gravitational tidal forces.<ref name="GG4">''[[Galaxy Guide 4: Alien Races (Second Edition)|''Galaxy Guide 4: Alien Races'', Second Edition]]''</ref><ref name="UAA">''[[Ultimate Alien Anthology]]''</ref><ref name="NEGAS">''[[The New Essential Guide to Alien Species]]''</ref> All Givin cities were located on high [[Mountain/Legends|mountain]] peaks, where the danger posed by the rampaging oceans was minimal<ref name="LoE">''[[Lords of the Expanse]]''</ref>

==Behind the scene==
The word Dodecapolis comes from the combination of two [[wikipedia:en:Greek language|Greek]] words, δώδεκα {{C|twelve}} and πόλις {{C|city}}.
